tech_news.title: Here’s what Mira Murati’s AI company is up to - The Verge
tech_news.description: Thinking Machines, the AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, announced Monday that it’s working on something called “interaction models.”

tech_news.title: Finally, texts between Android and iPhone users can be end-to-end encrypted - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Google had urged Apple for years to support RCS texting to make communication between each company's devices more seamless.

tech_news.title: Everett-based Funko is hit with a new lawsuit - The Seattle Times
tech_news.description: A new lawsuit claims Everett-based Funko, known for its Pop! vinyl figures, misleads users about how their data will be used.

tech_news.title: Govee’s new portable smart lamp is on sale for the first time - The Verge
tech_news.description: Govee’s Table Lamp Classic is $63.99 ($16 off) at Amazon. The cordless lamp offers colorful lighting effects, Matter support, and up to 30 hours of battery life.
